retained_observations.retained_reason: The active action matrix now mixes release authority, artifact freshness, fixture cost, compatibility alias, and external-verification work; closing this observation before lane sequencing would hide the coordination risk.
retained_observations.next_action: Continue one active-matrix lane at a time for the 10 currently-valid actions: first release-run authority binding, then goal-runtime certificate, artifact-freshness attention, maintainability source-action lanes, and operator-only supply-chain/GitHub governance evidence; refresh external-report-action-matrix after each completed lane instead of adding coordination reports.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the active matrix no longer needs a separate priority coordination note because the remaining active actions have current owner lanes and blocking scopes.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Compatibility alias cleanup is intentionally incremental because removing flat imports without caller inventory would turn a maintenance lane into a broad interface migration.
retained_observations.next_action: Continue lane-based hotspot decomposition for external_report_lifecycle, release_closeout_batch_manifest, and goal_runtime_run_admission; refresh compatibility-alias inventory on each touched hotspot.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the compatibility-alias inventory has no remaining flat import re-export entries or each remaining alias has an explicit retained support contract.

retained_observations.retained_reason: This is the umbrella execution guard for the current long-term active-matrix cleanup; closing it would encourage new narrative reports instead of lane work.
retained_observations.next_action: Keep executing the active matrix as lanes, not narrative reports: release-run authority binding, goal-runtime certificate, artifact-freshness attention, maintainability hotspot/service-layer source work, and operator-only supply-chain/GitHub governance evidence. retained_observations.retained_reason: The refreshed action matrix still has release-run, sealed-release, supply-chain, and GitHub governance blockers that require official release/operator lanes rather than more source-only refactoring.
